quotes.text: In other words, that nation that keeps God's commandments and walks in His ways will prosper. The framers of our Constitution knew that, and they tried to lay a solid moral foundation for a society that could be so blessed. As they did so, perhaps they thought of Roger Williams and others like him who made a heroic fight for religious freedom.
quotes.speaker: M. Russell Ballard
quotes.attr: M. Russell Ballard, "Religion in a Free Society," Ensign, Oct. 1992, 66

notes: neither thou nor thy fathers have known; and there shalt thou serve other gods, wood and stone.
